heading: Lake Cheraw water reclamation and reuse study
label: 390h–8 Lake Cheraw water reclamation and reuse study
notes: Amendments1994—Subsec. (c). substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” before “of the House”.Pub. L. 103–437
amendments: Amendments1994—Subsec. (c). substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” before “of the House”.Pub. L. 103–437

children.heading: General authority
children.label: a General authority
children.text: The Secretary is authorized, in cooperation with the State of Colorado and appropriate local and regional entities, to conduct a study to assess and develop means of reclaiming the waters of Lake Cheraw, Colorado, or otherwise ameliorating, controlling and mitigating potential negative impacts of pollution in the waters of Lake Cheraw on groundwater resources or the waters of the Arkansas River.

children.heading: Federal share
children.label: b Federal share
children.text: The Federal share of the costs of the study authorized by this section shall not exceed 50 per centum of the total.

children.heading: Report
children.label: c Report
children.text: The Secretary shall submit the report authorized by this section to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate and the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives not later than two years after appropriation of funds authorized by sections 390h to 390h–39 of this title.
